hero.subtitle: Organize your digital world with ZenMarks, the bookmark manager for productivity and leisure.

cards.subtitle: Everything you need to curate, consume, and understand content faster.

items.title: Import your links
items.description: Bring your favorite Chrome links with one click.
items.detail: Move your bookmarks in seconds and keep your workflow in one place.

items.title: Never forget anything
items.description: Add notes, descriptions, images, lists and tasks.
items.detail: Capture context for every saved link so you always remember why it mattered.

items.title: All your videos
items.description: Watch and summarize YouTube videos with AI.
items.detail: Save learning resources and quickly extract key points.

items.title: Add new links
items.description: Save new links with the Chrome extension.
items.detail: Clip pages instantly and keep your library up to date.

items.title: Organize your way
items.description: Arrange your links in the way that works best for you.
items.detail: Use categories, columns and custom order to build your own system.

section.title: Powerful Features Within Reach
section.text1: Summarize and chat with YouTube videos, save links with copy and paste, and add detailed descriptions, images and notes.
section.text2b: gives you a complete toolkit to extract and synthesize information from your links. Reorder everything easily, play videos directly in the app, and more.
